# getascraper/how-to-scrape-property24

> Property24 Scraper is an Apify Actor that extracts property listings, prices, locations, and agent contacts from Property24.com across African markets. Free tier available.

## Overview
- Property24 scraper and real estate listing data extraction API
- Extracts: asking price, location and suburb, bedrooms and bathrooms, floor and plot size, agent and agency WhatsApp contacts
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel, XML, RSS
- Free tier: included

## Key Pages
- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-property24/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/getascraper/property24-scraper
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~property24-scraper
- Source Actor: https://github.com/getascraper/actorstack/tree/main/actors/property24-scraper

## How it works
1. Give the actor one or more locations, or paste your own Property24 search or listing URLs
2. The actor collects matching property listings and normalizes each into a flat row
3. Turn on deep scrape to add agent contacts, WhatsApp links, coordinates, and full property details

## Target site characteristics
- Publicly listed residential and commercial property data
- Thousands of active listings across supported countries at any time
- Covers African markets including South Africa, Namibia, Kenya, Botswana, Zimbabwe, Zambia, Nigeria, Tanzania, and Mozambique

## API Usage
- Node.js SDK: https://docs.apify.com/api/client/js
- REST API: https://docs.apify.com/api/v2
- MCP server: https://github.com/apify/apify-mcp-server

## Supported target URLs
- https://www.property24.com/for-sale/*
- https://www.property24.com/to-rent/*
- https://www.property24.com/recently-sold/*

## Pricing
- Free tier: included, first 50 results of every run
- Paid: $0.69 per 1,000 results (Property listing and Enriched listing events, $0.00069 each)

## Output schema (highlights)
- price: Asking price as a clean number
- bedrooms, bathrooms, floor_size, erf_size: core property metrics
- agency_name, agent_name, agent_phone, whatsapp_link: agent contact details from deep scrape
- suburb, city, province, country: location breakdown

## Use cases
- Property fund analysts tracking new listings in target suburbs
- Real estate lead generators building agent contact lists
- Relocation agents comparing rentals for clients
- Data analysts building housing price models

## Support
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-property24/issues
- Apify Console: https://console.apify.com/actors/getascraper~property24-scraper/issues
